channel.title: InYourBones — Bay Area Radar (far_out)
channel.description: Curated upcoming Bay Area shows from InYourBones.

item.title: The Mountain Goats @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-11-17 04:00 → 2026-11-22 04:00 — The Mountain Goats at The Fillmore. The Mountain Goats are known for their compelling storytelling and dynamic live performances, making this multi-night event at The Fillmore a must-see.

item.title: Manic Street Preachers @ The Regency Ballroom
item.description: 2026-11-17 04:00 — Manic Street Preachers at The Regency Ballroom. Manic Street Preachers bring a rich legacy of politically charged lyrics and anthemic rock, promising an engaging show at The Regency Ballroom.

item.title: Gracie Abrams @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-12-07 04:00 → 2026-12-08 04:00 — Gracie Abrams at Oakland Arena. Gracie Abrams is gaining traction in the pop scene, and her tour is likely to resonate with fans at Oakland Arena.

item.title: Olivia Rodrigo @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-12-12 03:00 → 2026-12-13 03:00 — Olivia Rodrigo at Oakland Arena. Olivia Rodrigo's rise in the pop world makes her tour a significant event, especially for younger audiences.

item.title: John Summit @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-12-05 03:00 → 2026-12-06 03:00 — John Summit at Oakland Arena. John Summit's CTRL ESCAPE tour promises an exciting electronic experience, appealing to dance music fans.

item.title: KATSEYE @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-11-20 04:00 — KATSEYE at Oakland Arena. Son Volt's alt-country sound has a dedicated following, making their show at August Hall noteworthy.

item.title: Straight No Chaser @ Palace of Fine Arts
item.description: 2026-11-18 03:30 — Straight No Chaser at Palace of Fine Arts.

item.title: Three Days Grace @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-11-19 03:00 — Three Days Grace at SAP Center at San Jose.

item.title: The Neighbourhood @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-12-03 03:00 — The Neighbourhood at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium.
